title: selaginella subvaginata
intro: Selaginella subvaginata, also known as the Spore Fern, is a species of evergreen perennial plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Selaginella subvaginata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against various diseases, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Selaginella subvaginata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its numerous health benefits.
